message:
fix(fcp-sdk): use saturating_add for rate limit effective_limit calculation

Replace bare addition with saturating_add when computing effective_limit
from requests + burst in PoolState::check_consume() and status() to
prevent potential integer overflow when both values are large u32s.

Also update Cargo.lock for new connector dependencies (lettre, native-tls,
nom 8, chumsky, etc. pulled in by email-generic and other new scaffolds).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
